label: UNKNOWN_RESIDUAL_TAIL_LOCAL_FIELDS_INSUFFICIENT_FOR_NEW_SAMPLE_PRESERVING_MECHANISM

selection_result.reason: Existing local fields now support producer/export and verifier tooling, but they do not expose enough same-window action-level source truth to design another sample-preserving non-price mechanism after ledger_tail_first_pair_priority_v1 returned exactly zero residual improvement.

not_sufficient_because: source_pair_qty/source_pair_cost/source_pair_pnl are post-hoc attribution outputs, not safe pre-action admission fields.
source_residual_qty/source_residual_cost/source_residual_age_s are post-hoc outcomes and cannot become a live rule without same-window source-order linkage.

pre_seed and ledger_proxy fields alone can only produce side/offset/ledger threshold rules, which collapse into summary-only removal, static cutoff, admission cap, or previously frozen cap/cooldown families.
pair_inventory_priority is the only sample-preserving local lever tested so far; ledger_tail_first_pair_priority_v1 preserved sample and pair_qty but improved no residual metric.

exact_missing_fields_for_next_real_diagn: quote_intent_id for no-order shadow candidate/order intent
source_order_id for no-order shadow virtual order
candidate_row_id/source_order_id join key between no-order exemplar and local selected_seed export
same-window trigger source sequence and event time
same-window pre_seed same/opp qty/cost as observed by the no-order runner
same-window ledger_proxy_before and ledger_proxy_after as observed by the no-order runner
same-window source_pair_qty/source_pair_cost/source_pair_pnl for the same source action
same-window source_residual_qty/source_residual_cost/source_residual_age_ms for the same source action
source-link residual-tail concentration by side+offset+risk_direction with source_sequence coverage >=95%

research_ranking.label: UNKNOWN_RESIDUAL_TAIL_LOCAL_FIELDS_INSUFFICIENT_FOR_NEW_SAMPLE_PRESERVING_MECHANISM
research_ranking.interpretation: Local tooling is ready, but the remaining mechanism-design evidence needs same-window no-order source fields. This is not an economic-negative verdict for D+ overall.

promotion_gate.reason: status hygiene only; no private truth, deployability, canary, or promotion evidence

next_executable_action: Wait for exact main-thread approval of late_repair90_residual_tail_exemplar_no_order_review before any SSH/shadow; if approved, run bounded safety preflight, start only that no-order dry-run shadow if preflight passes, pull back only allowlisted summary/manifest files, then run scorer, selector, and ledger-context verifier. Without approval, keep local work at 30-minute cadence and do not invent another local mechanism from insufficient fields.
